conversation.text: I want to arrange a demo of CINNOX.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  CINNOX AI Bot — UAT Demo Session
  Knowledge Base: 418 chunks
  Mode: Pre-sales & Support Triage
  Language: English
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Welcome! We'd love to help you get started with CINNOX. To make sure we connect you with the right team, may I start with your name?
Nice to meet you, Emma! And your company name?

Thanks, Emma! Let me confirm your details:

- **Name:** Emma Laurent
- **Company:** Lyon Digital Agency
- **Email:** emma@lyondigital.com
- **Phone:** +33-6-1234-5678

Is that correct?

Thank you, Emma! Your information has been saved.

Now, regarding arranging a demo of CINNOX — let me look into what we can offer you. Could you tell me a bit more about what you're looking for? For example, are you interested in a specific feature area like omnichannel messaging, voice solutions, or our full platform overview?
nothing specific, just want to look around what you got and what we can do with cinnox

Great question, Emma! Here's a quick overview of what CINNOX offers:

CINNOX is an omnichannel engagement platform with several package tiers to fit different needs:

- **Basic Contact Center (BCC)** — Voice customer service with virtual numbers, forwarded to your phone or CINNOX agents, plus web-based online support.
- **Digital Commerce (DC)** — Focused on digital sales and customer engagement channels.

The platform includes **multimedia capabilities** like live chat, voice calls, video calls, video conferencing with screen sharing, and content filtering.

It also offers **rich integration with third-party apps** via an open API platform, so it connects natively with common enterprise software you may already use.

Would you like me to dive deeper into any of these areas — such as pricing, specific integrations, or a particular use case for your agency?
No worries! If you'd like to explore anything specific later, I'm right here. Is there anything else I can help you with, Emma?
Yes, for the time of demo, any weekday afternoon works for me.

Thanks for letting us know your availability, Emma! Scheduling a demo is something our sales team handles directly.

I'm connecting you with our sales team now. They'll be with you shortly to arrange a convenient time for your demo.━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  Session Ended
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
